LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JAMES PAPPAS MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AND FOR AN AWARD OF ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. ALTHOUGH THE PARTIES SETTLEMENT PROVIDED THAT A MOTION COULD BE DIRECTED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IF BILL DID NOT COMPLETE THE TRANSACTION, IT DOES NOT STATE WHAT PLAINTIFF'S OBLIGATION WOULD THEN BE. NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AND FOR AN AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GASPARATOS, SOPHIE INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS S.P. PROPERTIES HEARING SET FOR NOV-03-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

DECLARATION OF OF WALTER PARSLEY IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AND FOR AN AWARD OF ATTY FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT PAPPAS, JAMES PAPPAS, CARMEN J.P.PROPERTIES, A SOLE PROPRIETORSHIP

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF SOPHIE GASPARATOS' MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AND FOR AN AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS. MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. THE SETTLEMENT AND THEREFORE THE JUDGMENT REQUIRES THE DEFENDANT TO TRANSFER HIS INTEREST TO BILLY NOW AND REQUIRES PLAINTIFF TO MAKE HER TRANSFER TO BILLY IRREVOCABLE NOW. THE JUDGMENT SHALL STATE THAT DEFENDANT SHALL DEED HIS INTEREST TO BILLY WITHIN 10 DAYS AND THAT WITHIN 10 DAYS, PLAINTIFF WILL MAKE HER OBLIGATION IRREVOCABLE EITHER BY SIGNING THE PROPOSED NOTICE OR ANOTHER EFFECTIVE INSTRUMENT. THE REQUEST FOR FEES IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189 (301/PJB)
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT (NO SASE, COPY OF ORDER IN DEPT. 301 OUTBOX)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement And For An Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Nov-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. CYRIL L. LAWRENCE, TEL. NO. (209) 383-6854 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF SOPHIE GASPARATOS' Motion To Enforce Settlement And For An Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs. MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. THE SETTLEMENT AND THEREFORE THE JUDGMENT REQUIRES THE DEFENDANT TO TRANSFER HIS INTEREST TO BILLY NOW AND REQUIRES PLAINTIFF TO MAKE HER TRANSFER TO BILLY IRREVOCABLE NOW. THE JUDGMENT SHALL STATE THAT DEFENDANT SHALL DEED HIS INTEREST TO BILLY WITHIN 10 DAYS AND THAT WITHIN 10 DAYS, PLAINTIFF WILL MAKE HER OBLIGATION IRREVOCABLE EITHER BY SIGNING THE PROPOSED NOTICE OR ANOTHER EFFECTIVE INSTRUMENT. THE REQUEST FOR FEES IS DENIED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =(301/PJB)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement And For An Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Feb-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Walter Parsley, Esq., 415-777-1800 for defendant and moving party James Pappas
Court Call Appearance: Cyril Lawrence, Esq., 209-383-6854 for plaintiff and opposing party Sophie Gasparatos

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT JAMES PAPPAS Motion To Enforce Settlement And For An Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs IS DENIED. ALTHOUGH THE PARTIES SETTLEMENT PROVIDED THAT A MOTION COULD BE DIRECTED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IF BILL DID NOT COMPLETE THE TRANSACTION, IT DOES NOT STATE WHAT PLAINTIFF'S OBLIGATION WOULD THEN BE. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB/X-AB)
